app.name: Cast
app.one_liner: Cast is a command line utility that abstracts away SaltStack for installing compatible forensic and security distributions like SIFT and REMnux.

screens.name: Main CLI Interface
screens.purpose: Provide command-line access to install SaltStack-based distributions via built-in aliases.

rust_commands.name: install_distribution
rust_commands.purpose: Installs a SaltStack-based distribution by resolving an alias to its repository and executing SaltStack states.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement core CLI command to resolve and install supported distributions
week 1: Package as signed binary and .deb installer
acceptance_tests: Cast binary is available as signed release artifact for multiple architectures
Given the 'remnux' alias, Cast resolves it to 'remnux/salt-states' and initiates installation
Given the 'sift' alias, Cast resolves it to 'teamdfir/sift-saltstack' and initiates installation
